cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.26.4)
project("ThirdParty")

set(SHADERC_SKIP_TESTS ON)
set(SHADERC_ENABLE_TESTS OFF)
set(SPIRV-Headers_SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/projects/spirv-headers")
set(OVERRIDE_MSVCCRT OFF)
set(SHADERC_ENABLE_SHARED_CRT ON)
message(WARNING "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/projects/spirv-headers")
cmake_policy(SET CMP0091 NEW)
#set(CMAKE_MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
add_subdirectory(projects/glfw)
add_subdirectory(projects/spirv-tools)
add_subdirectory(projects/spirv-headers)
add_subdirectory(projects/glslang)
add_subdirectory(projects/spirv-cross)
add_subdirectory(projects/shaderc)
